"D:\Program Files\STM32CubeCLT_1.18.0\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Expression_Evaluator_Prz.dir/objects.a
D:\ProgramData\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Expression_Evaluator_Prz.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Expression_Evaluator_Prz.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\ProgramData\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Expression_Evaluator_Prz.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Expression_Evaluator_Prz.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libExpression_Evaluator_Prz.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Expression_Evaluator_Prz.dir\linkLibs.rsp
